name: coassisted-workspace
description: Google Workspace + AP/AR + PandaDoc automation for Claude Cowork. 390 tools across Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Sheets, Docs, Tasks, Contacts, Chat, Maps, Route Optimization, AP/AR receipt + invoice + collections workflows, project labor ingestion, master rollups, and PandaDoc quote workflows.
long_description: CoAssisted Workspace is an MCP server built on Google Workspace + Maps + Anthropic Claude + PandaDoc, providing 390 tools across 14 categories. Highlights: Gmail send/search/draft/reply, Calendar event management with drive-time blocks, Drive upload/download/access-audit, Sheets read/write/append, Docs creation/editing, Tasks, Contacts CRM (with auto-refresh + activity log + mail merge), Chat send/search/spaces, Maps geocoding/places/directions/distance-matrix/route-optimization, AP receipt extraction with Tier-0.5 internal-image bypass + 4-tier GL classifier + Workday EIB writer, AR invoice generation + aging + collections (gated to draft mode by default), project labor ingestion from StaffWizard, master rollups with baseline-deviation alerts, and full PandaDoc v7.24.0 OpenAPI coverage including 5 quote workflows. Built with FastMCP. Includes system_doctor health diagnostics.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Required for receipt OCR (Claude Vision), email classifier LLM tier, and brand-voice composition. Get one at console.anthropic.com.

google_maps_api_key.title: Google Maps API Key
google_maps_api_key.description: Required for the Maps and Route Optimization tool families. Get one at console.cloud.google.com.
